name: MoEngage Customer Engagement API
what_it_does: MoEngage REST API for AI-powered customer engagement and mobile marketing platform. Enables AI agents to import user attributes, trigger personalized campaigns, retrieve analytics and funnel data, manage segments and cohorts, and integrate MoEngage engagement data into CRM and product analytics workflows. MoEngage is focused on mobile-first engagement for consumer apps.
use_cases: Importing user events and attributes from product analytics agents
Triggering personalized push and email campaigns from marketing automation agents
Retrieving campaign analytics and conversion funnels from growth analytics agents
Managing user segments and audience cohorts from CRM integration agents
not_for: B2B SaaS without mobile app component
Enterprise IT without consumer marketing focus
best_when: A consumer mobile app company using MoEngage wants AI agents to analyze user engagement, trigger personalized campaigns, and integrate behavioral data into growth and retention workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: User behavioral data, device identifiers, and engagement tracking require GDPR/CCPA consent. User profiling from behavioral data requires privacy disclosures.

auth.notes: MoEngage API uses app ID + secret key for HTTP Basic authentication. Keys are app-scoped (per MoEngage app/workspace). Data center region must match app configuration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; contact MoEngage for pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Pricing varies by monthly active users and channels
pricing.notes: MoEngage is enterprise-focused. India-headquartered with global data centers. Contact sales for pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits vary by plan and API type; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: User behavioral data and device identifiers require GDPR/CCPA consent
No public MCP server — REST API with Basic auth
Data center region must match app configuration — US, EU, SG, and IN are different endpoints
MoEngage uses separate import and export APIs with different rate limits
User profile APIs and event tracking APIs have different authentication requirements
India-headquartered company — data residency options include IN and SG for APAC
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: User behavioral data, device IDs, and engagement tracking. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CCPA. Basic auth with app ID/secret. Multi-region data centers.

security_score_components.security_notes: User behavioral and engagement data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CCPA. Basic auth. Multi-region data residency.
